MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Metalclad Insulation Corp.'s motion for summary judgment has been withdrawn at the defendant's request, and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to issues 1 and 2 (general negligence excluding negligent failure to warn, strict liability design and manufacturing defect) and denied as to issue 3 (punitive damages). As to adjudication issues 1 and 2, defendant satisfied its burden of production of making a prima facie case that it is entitled to prevail on its government contractor defense as to non-duty to warn claims and plaintiffs have not presented admissible evidence creating a triable issue on this defense. As to punitive damages, defendant failed to sustain its burden of production that plaintiffs do not now possess and cannot reasonably obtain evidence that defendant acted with the requisite malice, fraud or oppression to warrant punitive damages. Plaintiffs' responses to defendant's special interrogatories preclude defendant from successfully invoking the factually devoid prong of Aguilar. Prevailing party to prepare an order. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Reporter: Carol Haraburda of AIKEN WELCH, CSR #8052 (503/TLJ)
